title: Midnight Chewy Egyptian Saskatoon Berries Stir-fry
description: A savory and chewy Egyptian dish featuring saskatoon berries in a midnight-craving style stir-fry, suitable for jain-friendly diets.
instructions: Chop the saskatoon berries into small pieces.
Mince the garlic cloves and ginger.
Combine jaggery, water, minced garlic, ginger, salt in a saucepan. Heat until it melts completely and mix well.
Add the chopped saskatoon berries to the sauce, stirring constantly for 2-3 minutes or until they are fully coated with the syrup.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Once hot, add the berry mixture to the pan. Stir gently but frequently to prevent sticking and ensure all berries are evenly coated with the syrup.
Cook for an additional minute, allowing any excess liquid to evaporate and making sure the berries are fully cooked and chewy.
